rag_rules: AGREE annex blocks must be placed in component type scopes for assumptions/guarantees and implementation scopes for bindings
Component names, ports, and connections must be validated against the input AADL model before insertion
generic_rules: Preserve AADL architecture by inserting annex blocks at valid scopes without altering component structure
Only insert AGREE bindings in implementation scopes after relevant subcomponents and connections are defined
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts are enclosed in `annex agree {** ... **};` blocks
Assumptions and guarantees referencing ports must be in component type scopes
anti_patterns: Do not place implementation-level bindings in component type scopes
Do not reference AADL properties as AGREE variables without explicit typed ports or constants
irrelevant_topics: AGREE validator diagnostics and repair patterns
